item.title: About
item.description:

DIDN’T HAPPEN.

Web pins

Other sites:

src=ericmurphy.xyz

Other COOL sites:

No association with these sites, but i like them.
Search engines are garbage.

  • distro.tube
  • denshi.org
  • lukesmith.xyz
  • brycevandegrift.xyz

item.title: Cloud content.
item.description:
There is place for social media replacements but you’re in wrong place.

content archive(tar.gz)

TOR onion

Tips:

  • decompress with PeaZip, 7-zip, material files(android) or gnu tar
  • On android open html with markor or ghost commander.
  • On desktop drag and drop html from your file manager to browser.

About my content prodoosing and difficulty in doing it

I don’t like to write super long essays because i usually find that for the most part i feel like there is no need for endless slop, and it feels unmanagable for me pretty quickly.

The topics that i choose to write are usually difficult, but i feel like i have to create something meaningful so that i can give back like people that i read when i was younger, and so that new people that seek truth can get it at premium quality.

To some extent i also want to advertise myself and stick out of internet garbage ocean.

I have significantly more motivation to actually say something longer if the topic isn’t covered well, or ignored.
